title: Molten Copper Pot Tunisian Cheese Bake
description: A luxurious, salty date-night cheese dip featuring a yuzu-infused cure and rich goose fat, served bubbling in a traditional copper vessel.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 200 degrees Celsius.
Whisk the yuzu juice, goose fat, and dried oregano in a small bowl to create the cure.
Place the halloumi cubes into a heavy-bottomed copper pot.
Pour the yuzu and goose fat mixture evenly over the cheese cubes.
Sprinkle the crushed coriander seeds and chili flakes over the top.
Bake the copper pot in the center of the oven for 15 minutes.
Increase the heat to a broil for 2 minutes until the cheese develops golden spots.
Remove the pot carefully using heat-resistant gloves.
Allow the cheese to rest for 3 minutes to achieve the perfect molten pull.
Serve immediately with warmed flatbread or vegetable crudites.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
